title: ReproduceGym Claim Spec
description: Canonical single source of truth for ONE reproducible claim. This file (runs/<paper>/02-spec/<claim_id>.yaml) is also the human-readable record — it REPLACES the legacy private/targets.yaml. All agent-visible sandbox-task artifacts (task.md, params.yaml, protocol.yaml, expected.json, data_entry.json) are deterministically RENDERED from it by render_task.py; only reward/check.py is hand/agent-authored. The rendered task is ClawGym-pure: {data_entry.json, input_files/, reward/} with NO private/ (ClawGym copies only reward/ at scoring). Every leaf carries an `exposure` so the renderer routes it to input_files/ (visible) or reward/ (hidden). DRAFT — field set is expected to evolve.

claim_id.description: Stable id, unique within the paper, e.g. c001_std_bias.

claim_uid.description: Stable extraction-stage claim identity used to join candidate/evidence/refinement/report artifacts.

contract_hash.description: Hash of the verifier contract, preserved across report/spec/targets/check.py.

claim_num.description: Unique numeric id within the paper, assigned in importance order.

display_title.description: Short human-readable title for manifests and reports.

spec_hash.description: Hash of task-affecting canonical spec content; used to align task/run versions.

claim_type.description: Kind of claim; drives triage and verifier shape.

requires_training.description: Whether reproducing the claim needs a training run (vs eval-only). Informs budget + on/off-policy use.

cost.description: Coarse compute/time/engineering cost estimate; feeds resource_profile and v0 selection.

verifiability.description: How cleanly the claim can be checked by recomputing metrics from agent outputs.

exposure_policy.description: Default routing of fields to visible vs hidden. Per-leaf `exposure` overrides this.

statement.description: One-sentence falsifiable claim. Renders into task.md §1.

anchors.description: Pointers into the paper supporting the claim. Renders into task.md §2.

conditions.description: Experimental conditions to compare (e.g. baseline vs treatment) and the switches between them. Renders into task.md §3 + params.yaml algorithm_switches.

switches.description: Free-form knobs that differ in this condition.

matched_variables.description: Variables that MUST be held identical across conditions. Renders into task.md §3.

reproduction_protocol.description: Agent-facing reproduction protocol; may describe training, API calls, inference, evaluation, and expected artifacts.

verification_contract.description: Typed verifier contract used to derive thresholds/check.py. Kept for provenance alongside normalized metrics/thresholds.

params.description: Parameter inventory with provenance. Populated by extract_claims (text) + extract_figure_params (Qwen-VL). Renders into params.yaml + task.md §4.

metric.description: Primary metric this verifier target binds to.

condition.description: Optional condition label this value describes.

applies_to_claim.description: Whether this param is relevant to THIS claim.

local_substitute_allowed.description: If paper_unspecified, may the agent substitute a local value?

affects_strict_reproduction.description: Whether substituting/missing this blocks a strict verdict.

metrics.description: Primary metrics and how to recompute them. SINGLE SOURCE for task.md §7/§11, protocol.yaml metric_computation, expected.json, and reward/check.py.

formula.description: Recompute rule over metrics.csv, e.g. 'mean(grpo.grad_norm) / mean(drgrpo.grad_norm)'.

thresholds.description: Pass thresholds per metric. `exposure: hidden` keeps the target out of input_files/ (routed into reward/). Single source for both expected.json (if visible) and check.py constants.

target_value.description: Original paper target used for continuous reward shaping.

target_evidence.description: Audit trail for the paper evidence anchoring this verifier target.

tolerance.description: How the threshold was relaxed from the paper target.

required_outputs.description: What the agent must write under output/. SINGLE SOURCE for task.md §6/§8-10, protocol agent_must_write, and check.py REQUIRED_FILES/REQUIRED_COLUMNS.

verdict_rules.description: Maps situations to verdicts. SINGLE SOURCE for task.md §11, protocol verdict_rules, check.py.

reward.description: How check.py turns a verdict into a scalar in [0,1]. Hidden by construction (lives in reward/).

verification.description: Executable verification contract and pool routing derived from thresholds/targets.

input_files.description: Extra agent-visible assets to copy into input_files/ beyond rendered contracts (e.g. paper.md, figures/, starter/).

figure_dependencies.description: Figure evidence bound to this claim, normalized from Qwen-VL output and anchors.
